emptyDay.title: No meals on this day
emptyDay.subtitle_today: Add your first meal to start tracking.
emptyDay.subtitle_offline_today: You are offline. Local data may be incomplete for today.
emptyDay.subtitle_offline_past: You are offline. Connect to load meals for this day.

no_data.title: Nothing logged yet today
no_data.body: Start with your next meal and you’ll get a clearer daily view here.
no_data.whyBody: There isn’t enough meal data for today yet, so there’s no separate insight to show.

insufficient_data.title: There’s not enough signal yet
insufficient_data.body: Recent data is still too limited for a reliable insight. A few fuller entries will help.
insufficient_data.whyBody: There is some recent data, but not enough consistent and complete meal logging to generate a reliable insight.

under_logging.title: Logging has been light lately
under_logging.body: There have been fewer fully logged days recently. Logging your next meal will give you a clearer picture.
under_logging.whyBody: This insight is based on recent logging consistency and how many recent days had enough meal data to interpret.

high_unknown_meal_details.title: Some meals need more detail
high_unknown_meal_details.body: A few recent meals are missing nutrition details. More complete entries will improve the insight quality.
high_unknown_meal_details.whyBody: This insight is based on recent meals with missing or incomplete nutrition details.

low_protein_consistency.title: Protein has been low lately
low_protein_consistency.body: Recent days have missed your protein target more often. It may help to check your next few meals.
low_protein_consistency.whyBody: This insight is based on recent protein target coverage across your logged meals.

calorie_under_target.title: You’ve been under target often
calorie_under_target.body: Recent days have ended below your calorie target more often. It may be worth checking if that was intentional.
calorie_under_target.whyBody: This insight is based on how often recent logged days finished below your calorie target.

positive_momentum.title: Your logging looks steadier
positive_momentum.body: Recent entries have been more consistent and complete. You’re building a clearer picture over time.
positive_momentum.whyBody: This insight is based on improving logging consistency and meal completeness across recent days.

stable.title: No major pattern stands out
stable.body: There isn’t one clear issue driving today’s view. You can review your history or go deeper in chat.
stable.whyBody: This insight appears when recent data does not show one dominant issue or one strong positive signal.
